name: Danger Forever
short_description: Play as a human warrior piloting a mecha-dragon in Danger Forever, a 3D shoot'em up with RPG elements. Battle mechanoids and techno-demons in a hostile world. Fast-paced action and immersive gameplay make this the ultimate shoot'em up adventure.
detailed_description:
Lone human rides her mecha-dragon
                       through a hostile alien world of mechanoids and techno-demons


Dive into the immersive world of Danger Forever, a unique scrolling shooter game that takes you on a thrilling journey through procedurally generated levels. With a 3D environment to navigate and a fuel/heat system that adds depth to combat, this game keeps you on your toes as you blast through waves of enemies and avoid obstacles.

As you progress through the game, you'll have the opportunity to upgrade and customize your dragon using energy and materials obtained during level playthroughs. These upgrades will come in handy as you work to build a spaceship and fight your way out of the hostile planet.

With over 100 levels across 5 distinct regions and a procedurally generated world map, there's plenty of content to explore in Danger Forever. And if you're up for a real challenge, try your hand at the infinite survival levels and see how you stack up on the leaderboards. Plus, with multiple difficulty modes and the ability to unlock new abilities and weapon modes, this game has endless replay value.
